channel.title: Posts on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions

item.title: 10 Best Self-Hosted Alternatives to Google Drive in 2026
item.description: Discover the top 10 open source and self-hosted alternatives to Google Drive. Complete with Docker deployment guides and feature comparisons.

item.title: AdGuard Home vs Pi-hole: DNS Ad Blocking Comparison 2026
item.description: Compare AdGuard Home and Pi-hole for network-wide ad blocking. Setup guides, performance benchmarks, and feature comparison for home networks.

item.title: Automate Your Home Lab with Watchtower and Ansible
item.description: Automate updates, backups, and maintenance for your self-hosted services using Watchtower, Ansible, and cron jobs.

item.title: Best Open Source Project Management Tools (Jira Alternatives 2026)
item.description: Compare open source alternatives to Jira for project management. Vikunja, Plane, OpenProject, and Taiga comparison with deployment guides.

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Object Storage 2026: SeaweedFS vs MinIO vs Garage (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top self-hosted S3-compatible object storage solutions: SeaweedFS, MinIO, and Garage. Docker compose setups, performance benchmarks, and deployment guides for homelabs and production.

item.title: Bitwarden vs Vaultwarden vs KeePassXC: Password Manager Comparison
item.description: Compare Bitwarden, Vaultwarden, and KeePassXC for password management. Self-hosting guide, security features, and cross-platform support analysis.

item.title: Docker Compose for Beginners: Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Complete beginner's guide to Docker Compose. Learn how to define, run, and manage multi-container Docker applications with practical examples.

item.title: Gitea vs Forgejo vs GitLab: Self-Hosted Git Server Comparison
item.description: Compare Gitea, Forgejo, and GitLab for self-hosted Git repositories. Resource requirements, feature matrix, and Docker deployment guides.

item.title: Jellyfin vs Plex vs Emby: Complete Media Server Comparison 2026
item.description: Detailed comparison of Jellyfin, Plex, and Emby for self-hosted media streaming. Feature matrix, hardware transcoding support, and Docker setup guides.

item.title: Nextcloud vs ownCloud: Which is Better in 2026?
item.description: Compare Nextcloud and ownCloud for self-hosted file sync and share. Feature comparison, performance benchmarks, and migration guide.

item.title: Nginx Proxy Manager vs Traefik vs Caddy: Reverse Proxy Comparison
item.description: Compare Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, and Caddy for reverse proxy and SSL management. Docker setup guides and feature comparison for self-hosted services.

item.title: Ollama vs LM Studio vs LocalAI: Run LLMs Locally in 2026
item.description: Compare Ollama, LM Studio, and LocalAI for running large language models locally. Performance benchmarks, setup guides, and hardware requirements.

item.title: Self-Hosted AI Stack: Complete Local AI Setup Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to building a self-hosted AI stack with Ollama, Open WebUI, and embedding models. Docker compose setup for local AI workflows.

item.title: Self-Hosted Privacy Stack: Complete Guide to De-Google Your Life
item.description: Complete guide to replacing Google services with self-hosted open source alternatives. Email, calendar, contacts, notes, and more.
